notableEvents.label: Francisco Lindor reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Francisco Lindor reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Nolan Gorman.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Matthew Liberatore picks off Francisco Lindor at 1st on throw to first baseman Alec Burleson.

notableEvents.label: Brett Baty pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brett Baty flies out sharply to center fielder Victor Scott II.

notableEvents.label: Carson Benge pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Carson Benge strikes out on a foul tip.

notableEvents.label: Brett Baty pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brett Baty grounds out, shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Jared Young to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Carson Benge pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Carson Benge pops out to shortstop Masyn Winn.

notableEvents.label: Brett Baty pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brett Baty grounds into a force out, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to catcher Pedro Pagés. Juan Soto out at home. Jared Young to 3rd. Luis Robert Jr. to 2nd. Brett Baty to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Masyn Winn singles on a pop up to second baseman Marcus Semien. JJ Wetherholt scores.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Francisco Lindor reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Nolan Gorman.

notableEvents.label: Jordan Walker pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jordan Walker called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Thomas Saggese challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Masyn Winn steals (1) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Alec Burleson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alec Burleson grounds into a double play, second baseman Marcus Semien to shortstop Francisco Lindor to first baseman Brett Baty. JJ Wetherholt to 3rd. Iván Herrera out at 2nd. Alec Burleson out at 1st.
